mapper.sql: d.id, d.inspection_id, d.defect_type_id, d.defect_code, dt.name AS defect_type_name, dt.category AS defect_category, d.severity, d.description, i.inspection_item, i.lot_id, l.lot_number, d.created_at, d.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM defects d LEFT JOIN defect_types dt ON dt.id = d.defect_type_id LEFT JOIN inspections i ON i.id = d.inspection_id LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = i.lot_id ORDER BY d.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM defects d LEFT JOIN defect_types dt ON dt.id = d.defect_type_id LEFT JOIN inspections i ON i.id = d.inspection_id LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = i.lot_id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.severity = 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.severity = 'MAJOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS major_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.severity = 'MINOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS minor_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dt.category = 'ELECTRODE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS electrode_category_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dt.category = 'ASSEMBLY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assembly_category_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dt.category = 'ACTIVATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activation_category_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dt.category = 'OQC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oqc_category_count FROM defects d LEFT JOIN defect_types dt ON dt.id = d.defect_type_id
SELECT id FROM defect_types WHERE UPPER(code) = #{code} AND is_active = 'Y'

WITH date_series AS ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1) AS stat_day FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{days} ), defect_stats AS ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS stat_day, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count, SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'MAJOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS major_count, SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'MINOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS minor_count FROM defects WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days} - 1) GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.stat_day, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS stat_date, NVL(ds.total_count, 0) AS total_count, NVL(ds.critical_count, 0) AS critical_count, NVL(ds.major_count, 0) AS major_count, NVL(ds.minor_count, 0) AS minor_count FROM date_series d LEFT JOIN defect_stats ds ON ds.stat_day = d.stat_day ORDER BY d.stat_day
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defects ( id, inspection_id, defect_type_id, defect_code, severity, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inspectionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defectTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{severity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE defects SET inspection_id = #{inspectionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_type_id = #{defectTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_code = #{defectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, severity = #{severity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, updated_at = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id}
